successCriteria.description: src/modules/balance/balance.model.ts exists and exports LeaveBalance (re-exported from shared types), CreateLeaveBalanceDto (re-exported), and BalanceStatus enum with values INITIALIZED, ACTIVE, EXHAUSTED.
src/modules/balance/balance.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveBalanceRepository and PgLeaveBalanceRepository.
ILeaveBalanceRepository defines findByEmployeeAndPolicy(employeeId, policyId, fiscalYear), findByEmployee(employeeId), deductDays(id, days), restoreDays(id, days).
PgLeaveBalanceRepository extends BaseRepository<LeaveBalance> and implements ILeaveBalanceRepository, using pool from src/shared/db/connection for all database operations.
findByEmployeeAndPolicy returns the LeaveBalance for given employee, policy, fiscal year, or null.
findByEmployee returns all LeaveBalance records for the given employee.

deductDays atomically decrements remaining_days and increments used_days within a single database transaction, throws error if insufficient balance, and writes an audit record (action 'UPDATE') in the same transaction.
restoreDays atomically increments remaining_days and decrements used_days within a single database transaction, and writes an audit record (action 'UPDATE') in the same transaction.
All repository methods handle errors and throw meaningful exceptions (no unhandled rejections).
ARCHITECTURE.md updated to include BalanceStatus enum with values INITIALIZED, ACTIVE, EXHAUSTED.
tests/unit/modules/balance/balance.repository.test.ts exists and contains Jest tests for all ILeaveBalanceRepository methods using a mocked pool.

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Audit records: All state-changing operations write an audit record.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Phase 7: Balance service, controller, and routes
Phase 10: Leave service, controller, and routes
Any other modules not part of this phase
